misconceptions: Treating diaspora history as only U.S.-centered
Equating resistance only with armed revolt
Assuming a single monolithic “African American experience”
Ignoring African agency before and during the Atlantic trade
paper_rules: MCQ often stimulus-based (texts, images, data, maps)
FRQs require sourcing, contextualization, and evidence-based claims
Attend to continuity/change and comparison across regions/eras
Interdisciplinary lenses (history, literature, arts, social science) may appear
units_summary: U1 Origins of the African Diaspora (w≈0.25, q=125)
U2 Freedom Enslavement and Resistance (w≈0.25, q=125)
U3 The Practice of Freedom (w≈0.25, q=125)
